meta.source: Videha parallel corpus — QA-curated JSON from videha_corpus.xlsb
meta.purpose: Example-search only; not required by the main translator engine.
qa_rules: kept only original high/med confidence rows
removed rows with mismatching numbers/years across Maithili and English
removed rows with extreme length ratio > 3.5
removed rows starting with long ellipsis/rule marks
removed ambiguous rows where the same Maithili text mapped to multiple English texts or vice versa
